title: Data Sources
description: Data sources represent OMOP CDM database connections. Each source has daimon configurations for CDM, vocabulary, results, and temp schemas. Cohort generation and analyses are always run against a specific source.
tips: A source needs at least a CDM daimon and a results daimon to support cohort generation.
The vocabulary daimon can point to a shared schema if multiple sources use the same vocabulary version.
Test Connection verifies credentials and schema accessibility before running analyses.
Import from WebAPI pulls source configurations from an existing Atlas instance — useful during migration.
The results schema must be writable — ensure the DB user has INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE rights.
